name: Kool Aid Fizzy
recipeIngredient: 1 small package unsweetened Kool-Aid, choice of flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the small package of unsweetened Kool-Aid in a 2-quart pitcher.
2. Add 1 cup of sugar and 6 cups of cold water to the pitcher.
3. Pour in 12 ounces of lemon-lime soda pop (can).
4. Stir all ingredients together until well mixed.
5. Fill the pitcher with ice.
Makes 10 cups.
